zh.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.Tideswell, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Foljambe於1206年出生在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親John Foljambe28歲，母親Margaret Luttrell19歲。他於1260年與Margaret Gernon在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1272年被列為bailiff of the peak 。他去世於1283年1月17日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

zh-hans.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh-hans.Tideswell, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Foljambe于1206年出生在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲John Foljambe28岁，母亲Margaret Luttrell19岁。他于1260年与Margaret Gernon在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1272年被列为bailiff of the peak 。他去世于1283年1月17日在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Foljambe was born in 1206, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, his father, John Foljambe, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Luttrell, was 19. He married Margaret Gernon in 1260, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1272, at the age of 66, his occupation is listed as bailiff of the peak . He died on 17 January 1283, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Foljambe est né en 1206, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Foljambe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Luttrell, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Gernon en 1260, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1272, à l’âge de 66 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est bailiff of the peak . Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1283, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Foljambe 1206 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Foljambe 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Luttrell 19. Er hat 1260 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England Margaret Gernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1272, als er 66 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als bailiff of the peak  aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Januar 1283 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe è nato il nel 1206 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, John Foljambe, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Luttrell, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Gernon nel 1260, nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1272, all'età di 66 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come bailiff of the peak . Morì il 17 gennaio 1283, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambeが1206年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父John Foljambeは28歳，母Margaret Luttrellは19歳であった。1260年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルでMargaret Gernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1272年，66歳の時，職業はbailiff of the peak と記録されている。彼は1283年1月17日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambe(이)가 1206년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Foljambe(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Luttrell(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 Margaret Gernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1272년, 66세의 나이로 그의 직업은 bailiff of the peak 이었다. 그는 1283년 1월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Tideswell, England: Tideswell, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe nasceu em 1206, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Foljambe, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Luttrell, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Gernon em 1260, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1272, com 66 anos, sua profissão aparece como bailiff of the peak . Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1283, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Foljambe родился в 1206 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Foljambe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Luttrell, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Gernon в 1260 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1272 году, в возрасте 66 лет,  он работал по профессии bailiff of the peak . Он умер 17 января 1283 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Foljambe nació en 1206, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Foljambe, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Luttrell, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Gernon en 1260, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1272, a la edad de 66 años, su ocupación registrada era bailiff of the peak . Murió el 17 de enero de 1283, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
